package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for repeated_slice_clone_in_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: slices.Clone(...) or similar whole-slice cloning observed inside loops.
type CaseRepeatedSliceCloneInLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRepeatedSliceCloneInLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRepeatedSliceCloneInLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRepeatedSliceCloneInLoopModel
}

type CaseRepeatedSliceCloneInLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseRepeatedSliceCloneInLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRepeatedSliceCloneInLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRepeatedSliceCloneInLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRepeatedSliceCloneInLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "repeated_slice_clone_in_loop"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    copied := make([]CaseRepeatedSliceCloneInLoopDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    repeated_slice_clone_loop_negative := map[string]int{"repeated": 1, "slice": 2, "clone": 3, "loop": 4}
    repeated_slice_clone_loop_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    repeated_negative_0 := repeated_slice_clone_loop_negative["repeated"] + len(input)
    _ = repeated_negative_0
    slice_negative_1 := repeated_slice_clone_loop_negative["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_negative_1
    clone_negative_2 := repeated_slice_clone_loop_negative["clone"] + len(input)
    _ = clone_negative_2
    for loop_negative_3Index, item := range items { repeated_slice_clone_loop_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_3Index }
    return nil
}
